'''Pruett Products''' was a company that sold [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] replacement [[Limb/Legends|limbs]]. One of the company's advertisements claimed that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] mechanical hand was one of its products.

One of Pruett's employees was [[Jibb Swaine]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
